recipe: Egg Onion Scramble: Heat oil, sauté diced onions until golden. Crack 2 eggs, season with salt and pepper, scramble together. Serve hot with toast.
Egg Tomato Stir-fry: Sauté chopped tomatoes in oil until soft. Beat 2 eggs with salt, pour over tomatoes, stir until set. Garnish with spring onion.
Garlic Soy Chicken: Marinate chicken pieces in soy sauce and minced garlic for 30 min. Pan-fry on medium heat until cooked through. Serve with rice.
Tomato Cheese Pasta: Boil pasta until al dente. In a pan, simmer crushed tomatoes with garlic and basil. Toss pasta in sauce, top with grated cheese.
Egg Fried Rice: Cook rice and let it cool. Scramble eggs in a wok, add rice, drizzle soy sauce, toss on high heat for 3 minutes. Add spring onions.
Aloo Fry: Dice potatoes, boil until tender. Heat oil with cumin seeds, add sliced onions, fry until golden. Add potatoes, salt, turmeric, cook 5 min.
French Toast: Beat eggs with milk, sugar, cinnamon. Dip bread slices, fry in butter until golden on both sides. Serve with honey or maple syrup.
Tandoori Chicken: Marinate chicken in yogurt, turmeric, chili powder, garam masala for 2 hours. Bake at 200°C for 25 min until charred. Serve with naan.
Banana Smoothie: Blend 2 ripe bananas, 1 cup milk, 1 tbsp honey, and ice cubes until smooth. Pour into a glass and serve chilled.
Dal Tadka: Boil lentils until soft. In a pan, fry onions, add tomatoes, cumin, turmeric. Pour tempering over dal, simmer 5 min. Serve with rice.
Garlic Butter Shrimp: Melt butter, sauté minced garlic. Add shrimp, cook 2 min each side. Season with salt, pepper, lemon juice. Garnish with parsley.
Basic Pancakes: Mix flour, sugar, baking powder. Add beaten egg, melted butter, milk. Ladle onto hot pan, flip when bubbles form. Serve with syrup.
Chana Chaat: Drain canned chickpeas, mix with diced onion, tomato, green chili, lemon juice, chaat masala, and cilantro. Toss and serve cold.
Creamy Garlic Mushrooms: Slice mushrooms, sauté in butter with garlic until browned. Add cream, simmer 3 min. Season with salt, pepper, thyme.
Overnight Oats: Mix oats, milk, mashed banana, chia seeds in a jar. Refrigerate overnight. Top with nuts and berries before serving.
Paneer Stir-fry: Cube paneer and capsicum. Sauté onions, add veggies, toss with soy sauce and chili flakes. Cook 5 min on high heat.
Cheese Omelette Sandwich: Beat eggs, pour in a pan, add shredded cheese. Fold omelette, place between toasted bread slices. Serve with ketchup.
Garden Salad: Dice tomato, cucumber, onion. Toss with olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and oregano. Serve chilled as a side dish.
Veg Hakka Noodles: Boil noodles, drain. Stir-fry julienned vegetables in oil, add noodles, soy sauce, vinegar, chili sauce. Toss on high heat.
Baked Apples: Core apples, fill with brown sugar and cinnamon. Place in baking dish with water, bake at 180°C for 30 min until tender.
